# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

admin_listen: "0.0.0.0:8443" # Set the admin interface listening address (IP or hostname) & port, default to 127.0.0.1 and Port range is from 9000-50000 for upstream http services
proxy_listen: "localhost:80"   # Define listen addresses of Kong Gateway clients traffic by specifying localhost (local network) or IP address if you have set it in a specific local subnet. Defaults to `127.0.0.1`, available port ranges are from 4935-6080 for upstream services
